productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Force White Orange Shoe
description: Get ready to move in style in these Air Force 1'07 shoes from nike. The sleek design of these shoes makes it possible to pair it with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic uppers for protection and durability Perforations that allow for greater breathability on the toebox Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Appliqued logo on the sides Brand tab appliqued on the tongue and embroidered behind the collar Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort withan Airsole in the heel for better cushioning Removable footbed that can be replaced with an orthotic Outsole Durable rubber outsole with pivot points and circular grooves for greater grip and easy 180 degree movement shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
